title: draba magellanica
intro: Draba magellanica, also known as Magellan's whitlow grass or mountain draba, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Draba magellanica include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
